items.body_excerpt:
In 2018-19 (the year before Leon Rose took over), the Knicks didn't win thier 14th regular-season game until March 17th(!) 

They had lost 56 of their first 69 games that season

Tonight, the Knicks are attempting to win thier 14th PLAYOFF GAME IN A ROW (they haven't lost a single game in 7 weeks)
